notes: Two-leg copper/silver return-spread reversion basket from the approved PARNES-CME-COPPERSILVER-2026 card. The EA runs from the XCUUSD.DWX host setfile and reads both D1 close series to compute log(XCU return) minus beta times log(XAG return), standardized over a fixed lookback. Q02 must evaluate the logical basket, not standalone legs.
